<a id="mastodon-tools"></a>

### Mastodon Tools

- [BNolet/postodon](https://github.com/BNolet/postodon) `Python` -- Postodon is a server that will post to mastodon at a given interval, with each post consisting of an intro and content. 
- [DavidLibeau/mastodon-tools](https://github.com/DavidLibeau/mastodon-tools) `HTML` -- Useful tools for Mastodon users !
- [DocTocToc/doctoctocbot](https://github.com/DocTocToc/doctoctocbot) `Python` -- Mastodon & Twitter retweet bot with collective moderation of retweeted accounts through Quick Replies DMs
- [FedStoa/moa](https://github.com/FedStoa/moa) `Python` -- A Mastodon, Twitter, and Instagram Cross-poster
- [GanWeaving/bluesky-mastodon-poster](https://github.com/GanWeaving/bluesky-mastodon-poster) `Python` -- publish text and/or image posts on both Bluesky and Mastodon in one fell swoop
- [JayBigGuy10/JayBigGuy10.github.io](https://github.com/JayBigGuy10/JayBigGuy10.github.io) `HTML` -- provides an easy way to link to your Mastodon profile for others, without other people ending up on a different server
- [Juerd/tootpick](https://github.com/Juerd/tootpick) `HTML` -- Link target for Mastodon "share buttons"
- [Lartsch/FediAct](https://github.com/Lartsch/FediAct) `JavaScript` -- Chrome/Firefox extension that simplifies interactions on other Mastodon instances than your own. 
- [Linus2punkt0/bluesky-crossposter](https://github.com/Linus2punkt0/bluesky-crossposter) `Python` -- An app for crossposting your posts from bluesky to twitter and mastodon
- [NicolasConstant/sengi](https://github.com/NicolasConstant/sengi) `TypeScript` -- Mastodon & Pleroma Multi-account Desktop Client
- [RasmusLindroth/tut](https://github.com/RasmusLindroth/tut) `Go` -- TUI for Mastodon with vim inspired keys
- [ResearchBuzz/mastodon-link-ripper](https://github.com/ResearchBuzz/mastodon-link-ripper) `HTML` -- Rips links from Mastodon instance timelines and shows them to you in aggregate. Includes simple keyword and time filters
- [ThisIsMissEm/mastodon_api_exporter](https://github.com/ThisIsMissEm/mastodon_api_exporter) `Go` -- a prometheus exporter that gets some metrics from the mastodon api
- [ThomasLeister/mastopurge](https://github.com/ThomasLeister/mastopurge) `Go` -- Purges Mastodon accounts. Removes posts. Makes things clean again. 
- [Ulrar/umrc](https://github.com/Ulrar/umrc) `Haskell` -- IRC bot to control a mastodon or twitter account from a channel
- [acbeers/mastodonlm](https://github.com/acbeers/mastodonlm) `TypeScript` -- Mastodon List Manager
- [ashur/ppppost](https://github.com/ashur/ppppost) `JavaScript` -- 👻 Post to Mastodon and Twitter simultaneously from the command line
- [blind-coder/rsstootalizer](https://github.com/blind-coder/rsstootalizer)  -- Service to post RSS feeds to Mastodon
- [botwiki/fediverse-bot](https://github.com/botwiki/fediverse-bot) `JavaScript` -- A self-hosted fediverse bot.
- [cheeaun/phanpy](https://github.com/cheeaun/phanpy) `JavaScript` -- A minimalistic opinionated Mastodon web client
- [chr-1x/ananas](https://github.com/chr-1x/ananas) `Python` -- The Python Bot Framework for Mastodon
- [cipher387/OSINT-and-Cybersecurity-accounts-in-Mastodon](https://github.com/cipher387/OSINT-and-Cybersecurity-accounts-in-Mastodon)  -- This repository brings together tool builders, bloggers, speakers, book authors, and other interesting Mastodon accounts
- [cloudflare/wildebeest](https://github.com/cloudflare/wildebeest) `TypeScript` -- Wildebeest is an ActivityPub and Mastodon-compatible server
- [codl/forget](https://github.com/codl/forget) `Python` -- Continuous post deletion for twitter, mastodon, and misskey
- [danito/KnownEmbedMastodon](https://github.com/danito/KnownEmbedMastodon) `PHP` -- Convert mastodon status URLs into quoted toots
- [danito/KnownMastodon](https://github.com/danito/KnownMastodon) `PHP` -- Syndicate to Mastodon
- [declanbyrd/eleventy-plugin-mastoarchive](https://github.com/declanbyrd/eleventy-plugin-mastoarchive) `JavaScript` -- Eleventy plugin to expose your Mastodon posts as a global data object.
- [dethos/jacanaoesta](https://github.com/dethos/jacanaoesta) `Rust` -- Find people that no longer are active in your Mastodon follow list.
- [dhayab/moa-docker](https://github.com/dhayab/moa-docker) `Python` -- Cross post between Mastodon and Twitter. Based on https://gitlab.com/fedstoa/moa.

<a id="indieweb"></a>

## IndieWeb
_Micropub, Microformats, personal websites, and self-hosted publishing._

- [AngeloStavrow/indigo](https://github.com/AngeloStavrow/indigo) `HTML` -- An IndieWeb-friendly custom theme for Hugo
- [CodeFoodPixels/eleventy-plugin-webmentions](https://github.com/CodeFoodPixels/eleventy-plugin-webmentions) `JavaScript` -- An eleventy plugin to fetch webmentions and helper methods to display them
- [CrowderSoup/soup](https://github.com/CrowderSoup/soup) `HTML` -- An IndieWeb theme for Hugo.
- [DanilaFe/matrix-highlight](https://github.com/DanilaFe/matrix-highlight) `TypeScript` -- A decentralized and federated way of annotating the web based on Matrix.
- [Decentralized-Sharing-Working-Group/idno-file-picker](https://github.com/Decentralized-Sharing-Working-Group/idno-file-picker) `PHP` -- *DEPRECATED:* Plugin for Known that allows selecting files from your Cozy, ownCloud, or remoteStorage server.

<a id="secret-management"></a>

<a id="optimization"></a>

### Optimization Tools

- [Atlas-OS/Atlas](https://github.com/Atlas-OS/Atlas) `Batchfile` -- 🚀 An open and lightweight modification to Windows, designed to optimize performance, privacy and usability.
- [FastFlowLM/FastFlowLM](https://github.com/FastFlowLM/FastFlowLM) `C++` -- Run LLMs on AMD Ryzen™ AI NPUs in minutes. Just like Ollama - but purpose-built and deeply optimized for the AMD NPUs.
- [divriots/jampack](https://github.com/divriots/jampack) `TypeScript` -- Optimizes static websites for best user experience and best Core Web Vitals scores.
